chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1508 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.08.2025 For orders on MA 5905/25 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 5906/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Ghulamullah Chang, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. At the outset, learned counsel submits that he will be satisfied and would not press this Petition if the DIG Police Hyderabad is directed to decide the Appeal (at page ‘25’ Annexure ‘B’ of the court file) of the Petitioner pending before him at the earliest. Learned A.A.G. present in court in other matters waives notices and raised no objection to such proposal. Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of with direction to DIG Police Hyderabad to decide the Appeal of the petitioner pending before him within a period of two months by speaking order after providing hearing the Petitioner. Copy of this order be provided to learned A.A.G. for onward transmission and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
